chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA No.187 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.2104/2025 3. For hearing of main case 02.12.2025 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro advocate for the applicant Mr. Tarique Hussain Shaikh, CIR, Zone-III, LTU Learned Commissioner is present and states that the reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Zahid/*
